seo.title: Arabesque Carpentry | Architectural Woodwork & Fit-Out
seo.description: Arabesque Carpentry is a premium woodworking and interior fit-out company based in Sitra, Bahrain. Trusted for doors, fit-outs, staircases, wardrobes, kitchens, and specialist joinery.
seo.ogDescription: Premium woodworking and interior fit-out specialists in Bahrain, delivering doors, staircases, kitchens, wardrobes, and specialist joinery.

hero.description: Architectural woodwork and interior fit-out specialists delivering doors, joinery, and crafted spaces across Bahrain.

projects.description: Custom wooden entrances and decorative detailing developed for mosque environments, balancing craftsmanship, durability, and code-compliant performance.
Complete interior woodwork packages including doors, decorative panelling, and feature joinery for prayer halls and supporting spaces.
Retail environments shaped with custom display units, integrated lighting, and refined finishes suited to customer-facing commercial spaces.
Interior fit-out works delivered for commercial spaces requiring coordinated joinery, refined finishes, and dependable execution timelines.
Boutique spaces completed with bespoke cabinetry, display features, and detailing tailored to a premium customer experience.
Specialist joinery and restoration-oriented woodwork adapted for cultural spaces where finish quality and spatial character matter equally.

about.kicker: Built in Sitra. Delivered across Bahrain.
about.lead: Arabesque Carpentry delivers technical woodwork through finished spaces of presence: doors, fit-outs, staircases, wardrobes, kitchens, and specialist joinery for civic, religious, retail, and residential environments.
about.workshopValue: Architectural woodwork with precision finishing, engineered detailing, and large-scale delivery.
about.ethos: The factory in Sitra is built to handle both repetition and refinement: production-grade capacity for major packages, with enough control to protect the detailing, proportions, and finishing that high-visibility interiors demand.

pillars.description: Sales, engineering, and production move as one pipeline from approval drawings to installation.
Joinery, carving, coating, and hardware are treated as one finished experience, not separate trades.
Work spans mosques, public institutions, retail environments, and private residences across the Kingdom.
